welcome_desc_2: I focus on turning your ideas into real action and solving problems efficiently. I can build apps and reshape the system around your goals, helping you create a digital world of your own.
welcome_desc_3: The future should not fade into the abstract - it should take shape in form.
welcome_admin_hint: AIOS runs locally and does not use accounts or auth.
welcome_model_hint: Configure your AI core engine. Multiple providers and custom API endpoints are supported.
welcome_intro_hint: The system is ready. Here is the first response from the AI core:
welcome_err_mismatch: The two inputs do not match
welcome_default_intro: Hello, I am AIOS, your personal AI operating system. I can help you manage schedules, organize information, and gradually hand repetitive work over to automation. More importantly, I can work with you to build your own apps and create an intelligent digital world that truly serves you.
